mapper.insert: INSERT INTO agent_workspace_undo_lock (lock_id, workspace, holder_run_id, acquired_at, expires_at) VALUES (#{lockId}, #{workspace}, #{holderRunId}, #{acquiredAt}, #{expiresAt}) ON CONFLICT(workspace) DO UPDATE SET lock_id = excluded.lock_id, holder_run_id = excluded.holder_run_id, acquired_at = excluded.acquired_at, expires_at = excluded.expires_at WHERE agent_workspace_undo_lock.expires_at <= excluded.acquired_at
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM agent_workspace_undo_lock WHERE workspace = #{workspace} LIMIT 1
